title: Analytics Repair + Static Hub Fix + Calculator Indexing — PHASE 13C.10

key_achievements: Vercel Analytics ROOT CAUSE FOUND: package installed but never imported — Analytics component missing from layout
Vercel Analytics FIXED: import + <Analytics /> added to root layout body
GA4 consent FIXED: analytics_storage changed from 'denied' to 'granted'
Tier 2 calculator indexing: 12/12 COMPLETE — 100% GSC UI success rate
Tier 3 batch plan: 105 calculators in 11 daily batches of 10
New pages: /guides (125 guide links), /compare (35 comparison links), /disclaimer

vercel_analytics.root_cause: Package @vercel/analytics v2.0.1 was in package.json but import { Analytics } was MISSING from layout.tsx. No <Analytics /> component rendered. DNS prefetch for vitals.vercel-insights.com existed but no script loaded.
vercel_analytics.fix: Added 'import { Analytics } from "@vercel/analytics/next"' and '<Analytics />' inside body of src/app/layout.tsx
vercel_analytics.verification: Will load /_vercel/insights/script.js and fire analytics request after Vercel deploys commit 3d7fbde
vercel_analytics.qa_note: Qasem: After deploy, check https://www.qfinhub.com → DevTools Network tab → filter 'vercel' or 'insights' to confirm analytics request fires. Then check Vercel dashboard for live visitors.

ga4_backup.issue: analytics_storage default was 'denied' — GA4 page_view blocked until consent granted
ga4_backup.fix: Changed to 'granted' in consent defaults. GA4 will now track immediately.

production_test.6_urls_tested: All HTTP 200, all have gtag.js, all have vercel dns-prefetch
production_test.after_deploy: Vercel Analytics script will load on all pages. GA4 will fire page_view immediately.

static_hub_fixes./disclaimer: Created — educational use, not financial advice, estimates only, consult professionals
static_hub_fixes./guides: Created — hub page listing all 125 guides by category with navigation links
static_hub_fixes./compare: Created — hub page listing all 35 comparisons with descriptions

tier2_indexing.all_verified: HTTP 200, index/follow, self-canonical, in sitemap, not recently requested

biggest_blocker.resolved: Vercel Analytics not tracking — root cause found and fixed
biggest_blocker.next: Await Vercel deploy → verify analytics fires → Qasem confirms

can_phase_14_start: AFTER Qasem/ChatGPT reviews and confirms: (1) Vercel Analytics is working, (2) new hub pages are live, (3) Tier 2 indexing status verified
